title: Special columns are not handled properly with prewhere in ReadFromMergeTree
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_special_columns(key BIGINT, value VARCHAR(255), timestamp TIMESTAMP, is_active TINYINT) ENGINE = Replacing(timestamp) ORDER BY key;
SELECT key, value FROM test_special_columns WHERE is_active = 1 AND timestamp > '2023-01-01 00:00:00' ORDER BY key;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_special_columns WHERE is_active = 0;
key_bug_features: Special columns not handled in PREWHERE with ReadFromMergeTree
